designSystem.style: A whimsical, friendly, and clean aesthetic with a focus on rounded shapes, soft gradients, and a natural, inviting feel.

primary.name: Sky Blue
primary.description: Used for backgrounds, headers, and main interactive elements.

secondary.name: Soft Green
secondary.description: Used for foliage, accents, and complementary elements.

accent.name: Warm Orange
accent.description: Used for highlighting specific elements and calls-to-action.

neutrals.name: Subtle Grays
neutrals.description: Used for text, borders, and shadows.

typography.font_family: A rounded, sans-serif font, similar to 'Inter' or 'Poppins'.

layout.element_separation: Generous use of whitespace to create clear separation between components.
layout.alignment: Content is primarily centered within its container.

components.name: Container Card
components.structure: A rectangular shape with highly rounded corners, a subtle drop shadow, and a light background.

components.name: Button
components.structure: A pill-shaped button with rounded ends, a subtle shadow, and a smooth gradient.

attributes.gradient: Light gradient from top to bottom

components.name: Input Field
components.structure: A rectangular field with highly rounded corners and a very light border.

visuals.illustrations: Vector-based, vibrant, and friendly with no harsh lines. They use solid colors and subtle gradients.
visuals.icons: Simple, solid-filled, and minimal. Often contained within a circle or square.
